name: @lehuan/swiper-loop-carousel
description: Swiper-based infinite loop carousel with thumbnail drag navigation, zoom, and multi-view modes

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push --follow-tags && gh release create v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)") --title "v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")" --notes "" --latest
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push --follow-tags && gh release create v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)") --title "v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")" --notes "" --latest
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push --follow-tags && gh release create v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)") --title "v$(node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version)")" --notes "" --latest

author: lehuan
